title: Genie One search and discovery improvements
body:
* **Databricks Apps filtering**: Genie One consumers can now filter to include or exclude inactive Databricks apps when browsing. Inactive apps are those with a status other than Running, such as Stopped, Deploying, or Crashed. See [App status](/aws/en/dev-tools/databricks-apps/key-concepts#app-status).
* **Dashboard widget title search**: Search now supports dashboard widget titles.
* **Enhanced search rankings**: Certified and favorite content is now boosted in search rankings in Genie One.
* **Recents and favorites in discovery**: Recents and favorites are now surfaced in the **For you** page.
